scripts._comment: All scripts follow localhost:app:<category>:<action>. Categories: infra, services, ui, services-ui, all, postgres, secrets, aws, pm2.
scripts.localhost:app:ui:admin: npm run localhost:app:portals:ensure-install && cd portals && npm run start:admin
scripts.localhost:app:ui:customer: npm run localhost:app:portals:ensure-install && cd portals && npm run start:customer
scripts.localhost:app:ui:all-up: npm run localhost:app:portals:ensure-install && concurrently -k -n admin,customer,open "cd portals && npm run start:admin" "cd portals && npm run start:customer" "bash devops/local/ui-open-when-ready.sh"
scripts.localhost:app:services-ui:all-down: npm run localhost:app:services:all-down && npm run localhost:app:ui:all-down
scripts.localhost:app:services-ui:all-status: npm run localhost:app:services:all-status && npm run localhost:app:ui:all-status
scripts.localhost:app:postgres:run-all: npm run localhost:app:postgres:up && npm run localhost:app:postgres:wait && npm run localhost:app:postgres:migrate && concurrently -k -n trade,risk,indexer,masterdata "npm:localhost:app:services:trade" "npm:localhost:app:services:risk" "npm:localhost:app:services:indexer" "mvn spring-boot:run -pl middleware/fx-masterdata-service -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=postgres,no-migrate"
scripts.localhost:app:pm2:start: npm run localhost:app:infra:all-up && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js
scripts.localhost:app:pm2:stop: pm2 delete all && npm run localhost:app:infra:all-down
